items.title: Amazon is offering the Segway E3 Pro e-scooter down at $530 right now + other models starting from $140
items.summary:
While Segway has extended its Spring Sale EV lineup through to April 5th, we’ve spotted some of its popular e-scooters dropping lower in price over at Amazon, like the E3 Pro Electric Scooter at $529.99 shipped, for example, which beats its direct website pricing by $70. This newer model is listed with a $700 MSRP direct from Segway, however, you can more often find it down at $600 over at Amazon, with the Big Spring Sale pricing being retained here for added savings. While we have seen it go as low as $500 in the past, that rate hasn’t been seen since Black Friday, with the $70 markdown from its going rate (and $170 off the MSRP) being the next-best price to score it at. Head below for more on it and the other models seeing greater Amazon deals.

more…

While we have seen the price go a bit lower in the past, you’re still looking at a solid 20% markdown here that saves you $80 off the tag.

While we’ve seen other versions of this laptop with less memory or storage drop to lower prices, this particular model, packed with 32GB of RAM and a 2TB SSD, has never seen a discount this steep.
